ab: ci Ateng ku kapahay a cabay aku, u Sakizaya aca a awawa ciniza.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Ateng，他也是撒奇萊雅族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Ateng, and he is also an Sakizaya child.

ab: maladay kami micudad i Sakul a niyazu’.
en: We study together in the Sakul tribe.

ab: hina maladay kamin mitengil tu kungku nu kalas, matineng amin kami musakamu tu kamu nu Sakizaya.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說撒奇萊雅語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Sakizaya proficiently.

ab: talakaw kizemu aca kaku, mapulet makudus aca ci Ateng.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Ateng很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Ateng is short and thin.

ab: sisatahaw ci Ateng, manamuh amin ku katuuday cinizaan.
ch: Ateng很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Ateng is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
